title: HOME vertical service-name lockup
summary: HOME mobile/desktop brand area에 큰 무먹 아래 작은 무엇을 먹든을 세로 2단으로 표시하고 non-HOME 단독 표기를 보존한다.
goal: 사용자가 HOME에서 짧은명 무먹과 정식명 무엇을 먹든의 관계를 즉시 이해하되 기존 navigation geometry, 접근성, 상태, API/DB와 다른 화면의 짧은명 표시는 그대로 유지한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; user discontinued Claude
owners.codex: role-separated new sessions own Stage 1 docs, Stage 4 implementation, Stage 5/6 review, docs repair, and final authority; Stage 1/4 sessions cannot self-approve

dependencies: service-brand-rebrand merged through docs PR #985, backend PR #987, frontend PR #988
HOME confirmed baseline and historical evidence preserved
out_of_scope: Full-name supporting line on non-HOME AppBar, WebTopNav, wordmark, or narrow navigation
Desktop web nav height, tab position, active state, right slot, or interaction changes
HOME route, information architecture, search, filter, rail, card, state, auth, or bottom-tab changes
API, DB, schema, migration, seed, stored row, auth, or domain state transition changes
New dependency, font, token, image logo, mascot, or brand asset
Technical identifier, user content, generic noun 집밥, historical official version, prototype, or evidence edits
notes: Stage 1 contract prepared on docs/mumeok-home-lockup-contract under explicit user approval. Roadmap status is docs while workflow lifecycle remains planned because the schema has no docs enum. This is a small FE-only visual change but HOME direct modification keeps risk high, merge_policy manual, and authority review required. Stage 2/3 are skipped. Existing screenshot/evidence is immutable; Stage 4 creates new evidence only under service-brand-home-lockup.
